title: P2: Downgrade HtnPlanner raw action dump from Warning to Debug
description:
A Sprint 52 diagnostic log (TSK-0121 debugging) was left running at LogWarning level in AgentBackgroundService.DispatchActionsAsync: "[plan-raw] {Goal}: {N} total actions, first 5: [{Actions}]". An active agent that replans every ~10-30s produces a Warning log entry on every plan generation, which is noise for operators and can trigger alerting systems. After ~18 sprints, this diagnostic should be downgraded to LogDebug or removed entirely.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P2-9 [PR]
